image_prompt.prompt: Ultra photorealistic raw iPhone mirror selfie of a young Japanese woman in her early 20s standing in a spacious modern gym locker room with polished light grey concrete floors and a row of sleek matte black metal lockers lining the wall behind her. She has long dark brown hair pulled back into a high messy ponytail with loose wispy face-framing pieces falling around her temples and along her jawline, the ponytail itself cascading down past her shoulder blades with a slight natural wave from being tied up during her workout session, a few shorter flyaway strands sticking slightly to her damp neck and forehead from recent physical exertion giving the image an authentic just-finished-training quality. Fitness hourglass figure with ample chest pressing against the fitted fabric of her sports bra, toned defined core showing subtle ab definition visible through the tight material, wide curvy hips, and thick sculpted thighs filling out her shorts below the hemline. Light-medium neutral smooth skin with a healthy post-workout flush spreading across her cheeks and upper chest in a natural rosy gradient, a light sheen of fresh perspiration catching the overhead lighting across her collarbones and the bridge of her nose creating tiny specular highlights, natural skin texture with real pores visible especially across her nose and forehead and along the tops of her shoulders, no airbrushing or digital smoothing whatsoever. Naturally attractive face with expressive Japanese features including subtly arched natural brows and warm dark brown eyes. Minimal makeup consisting of softly filled natural brows with a gentle arch, the faintest trace of brown mascara on her upper lashes now slightly smudged and clumped from sweat during her workout, and completely bare soft lips with just her natural pink undertone showing through with a slight dryness at the corners from breathing hard. She wears a fitted charcoal grey performance sports bra with thin criss-cross straps visible at the back of her neck and between her shoulder blades and a subtle matte black Nike swoosh embroidered on the left chest panel, paired with high-waisted jet black spandex biker shorts that end at mid-thigh and hug every curve of her hips and upper thighs tightly with a wide supportive waistband sitting just above her navel, and clean white ankle-cut athletic socks visible above sleek matte black Nike Metcon training shoes with a flat sole. A small black Apple Watch with a black sport band sits on her left wrist and tiny simple gold ball stud earrings glint faintly in both ears catching pinpoints of the overhead light. She stands facing a large rectangular wall-mounted gym mirror with a thin brushed stainless steel frame, holding her iPhone 15 Pro Max in Natural Titanium finish at chest height with her right hand, her fingers wrapped naturally around the back of the device with her index finger along the top edge and her thumb resting casually on the volume button side, while her left hand is lifted up and back to grip the base of her ponytail as if tightening or adjusting the hair tie with her elbow raised and bent outward creating a dynamic triangular shape with her arm that lifts her ribcage on that side and accentuates the narrow taper of her waist in contrast with her hip below. Her weight rests predominantly on her right leg with her right hip pushed slightly out, left knee casually bent with her left foot turned outward and the toe of her sneaker barely touching the concrete floor creating a natural relaxed asymmetric stance. She gazes at the phone screen reflected in the mirror with a relaxed confident expression, her lips barely parted in a subtle almost-smile that is more attitude than grin, one eyebrow raised just a fraction higher than the other creating a quietly playful questioning look as if silently asking the viewer whether they approve of what they see. The locker room visible behind her in the mirror reflection shows a long row of the same matte black metal lockers each with small silver combination padlocks hanging from the latches, a sturdy light maple wood slatted bench running parallel to the lockers with a draped white cotton gym towel bunched casually at one end and a large clear Nalgene water bottle with visible condensation droplets beading on the outside surface sitting upright beside it, warm overhead recessed square LED panel lights set into the white ceiling tiles casting an even bright neutral-white illumination across the space with clean soft diffused shadows forming beneath the bench slats and under her chin and jaw, and a second row of lockers visible further back in the room creating a sense of depth and environment. The bright LED lighting bounces subtle warm reflections off the polished concrete floor surface creating a faint secondary fill light on the lower half of her legs and a crisp clean reflection of her full figure in the mirror that reveals the criss-cross strap detail of her sports bra from behind and the shape of her ponytail hanging between her shoulder blades. Charcoal grey, jet black spandex, polished concrete silver, clean bright white, warm flushed skin tones with rosy post-workout glow color palette. Athletic gym mirror selfie lifestyle aesthetic. Mirror selfie shot captured through the gym mirror at eye-level, full body framing from the top of her head to her training shoes with the brushed steel mirror frame visible at the left and right edges of the composition, centered vertical portrait composition with slight negative space above her head and the locker room environment visible on both sides. Photorealistic, high quality, high resolution, 9:16 aspect ratio.

image_prompt.prompt: Ultra photorealistic raw iPhone mirror selfie of a young Japanese woman in her early 20s standing in a sleek modern apartment hallway just before heading out for the evening. She has long straight jet-black hair with a sharp center part falling like silk curtains past her collarbones to her mid-back, the strands catching overhead light with a glossy blue-black sheen, a few face-framing pieces tucked behind her right ear revealing a small gold ear cuff while the left side falls freely creating deliberate asymmetry. Fitness hourglass figure with ample chest filling the structured neckline of her top, toned core visible through the fitted fabric, wide curvy hips accentuated by the high waist of her bottoms, and thick sculpted thighs. Light-medium neutral smooth skin with a healthy natural glow, real skin texture with visible pores across the bridge of her nose, natural complexion with a subtle warmth across her cheekbones. Minimal makeup with softly groomed natural brows, a precise thin wing of black liquid liner extending just past the outer corner of each eye adding sharpness to her naturally warm expression, barely-there brown mascara defining her lashes without clumping, clean dewy skin with no visible foundation, and a matte nude lip in a dusty rose shade that matches her natural lip tone almost exactly. She wears a fitted black ribbed knit long-sleeve top with a square neckline that sits just at the collarbone, the ribbed texture catching vertical light streaks along her torso, paired with high-waisted straight-leg cream tailored trousers with a crisp front crease and a subtle wide fabric belt in matching cream cinching her waist. On her feet just visible at the bottom of the frame are pointed-toe black patent leather mules. A delicate layered gold necklace set sits against her bare clavicle with a thin choker chain and a longer pendant chain, and she holds a small structured black leather crossbody bag with gold hardware in her left hand at hip level. Her right hand holds an iPhone 15 Pro Max at chest height angled toward the full-length mirror on the wall, her grip natural with her index finger along the top edge. Her weight shifts to her right leg pushing her right hip out in a natural confident contrapposto, left leg relaxed with the toe of her shoe barely touching the floor. She gazes at the phone screen in the mirror with a calm self-assured expression, her chin level, lips relaxed into the faintest closed-mouth smile that suggests she knows exactly how good she looks, eyes steady and direct. The hallway has a clean white wall, a slim modern black-framed full-length mirror, warm honey-toned oak hardwood floors, and a minimalist floating console table with a small green monstera plant in a white ceramic pot and a set of keys. Warm early evening light from a window at the end of the hallway creates a natural golden side-light from the left, casting a long soft shadow on the wall behind her and producing warm highlights along the left side of her face and the left sleeve of her top while the right side sits in slightly cooler ambient shadow. Clean white, jet black, warm cream, honey oak, matte gold, monstera green accent color palette. Effortless going-out confidence aesthetic. Mirror selfie shot at eye-level, full body framing from head to shoes, centered vertical composition with mirror frame visible at edges. Photorealistic, high quality, high resolution, 9:16 aspect ratio.

image_prompt.prompt: Ultra photorealistic photo of a young Japanese woman in her early 20s standing on a rooftop terrace in a trendy urban neighborhood during the last golden minutes before sunset. She has long dark brown hair in loose tousled waves that catch the golden backlight, the wind lifting several strands away from her face creating dynamic movement, warm honey-brown highlights visible through the naturally dark hair where the sunlight passes through, hair falling past her shoulders with a few wind-blown pieces crossing her face at the bridge of her nose that she has not bothered to push away giving the shot an effortless candid quality. Fitness hourglass figure with ample chest visible through her fitted top, toned core, wide curvy hips, and thick sculpted thighs filling out her jeans. Light-medium neutral smooth skin with a warm golden tone from the direct sunset light hitting her face and bare arms, real skin texture with visible pores across her nose and temples, a natural healthy flush across her cheeks deepened by the warm color temperature of the setting sun. Minimal makeup with softly groomed natural brows catching individual golden hairs in the backlight, barely-there mascara on naturally long lashes now rimmed with golden sunset light, clean bare skin with no visible foundation, and a soft natural lip in a warm pink tone that catches the sunset glow. She wears a simple fitted white crew-neck baby tee in thin cotton that hugs her torso and ends just above her navel showing a sliver of toned midriff, paired with high-waisted medium-wash straight-leg jeans with a slightly distressed knee and the denim faded naturally at the thighs and pocket edges, a thin brown leather belt with a small antique brass buckle threading through the belt loops. White low-top canvas sneakers. A simple thin gold chain bracelet on her right wrist catches sunset light as a single bright point. She stands with her left shoulder leaning casually against a weathered concrete rooftop railing, her right hand raised to push hair away from her face with fingers spread through the wind-blown strands at her temple, left arm resting along the top of the concrete railing with her hand hanging relaxed over the edge. Her weight settles into her left hip creating a relaxed lean, right leg crossed loosely in front of her left at the ankle. She looks directly at the camera with a warm playful expression, one corner of her mouth lifted in a subtle confident smirk, eyes bright and slightly squinted against the low sun behind the camera, radiating effortless charm and quiet self-assurance. The rooftop terrace has a weathered grey concrete half-wall railing, a cluster of terracotta plant pots with trailing green ivy and small succulents along the railing edge, the urban skyline visible in the soft golden haze behind her with building silhouettes and a few distant construction cranes, and the warm orange-gold sky of the final minutes of golden hour filling the upper portion of the frame. Low golden hour sunlight from directly in front and slightly below creates dramatic warm front-lighting that bathes her face and body in rich amber-gold tones, with a strong warm backlight from the sky behind her producing a glowing rim of golden light along the top of her head and shoulders and through the translucent edges of her wind-blown hair strands, the combination creating a luminous halo effect while maintaining clear detail on her face and expression. Warm amber gold, clean white cotton, medium denim blue, weathered concrete grey, terracotta, trailing green, urban skyline silhouette color palette. Golden hour rooftop casual confidence aesthetic. Third-person shot at eye-level, three-quarter body framing from knees up, slight rule-of-thirds composition with subject left of center and skyline filling the right background. Photorealistic, high quality, high resolution, 4:5 aspect ratio.

posts.notes: Variant B — Grok interactive fashion transformation. 'put me in a leather jacket' is a natural, on-brand Meruru request — she's in a simple white tee and jeans, playfully asking Grok to edge up her look. Stays within the fashion/beauty lane (no fantasy elements). The base image is a confident rooftop golden-hour shot that Grok can realistically transform. Grok text excluded from 30-char limit. 21:00 UTC captures US evening prime time.

image_prompt.prompt: Ultra photorealistic front camera selfie of a young Japanese woman in her early 20s sitting in the back seat of a luxury car at night, captured with the warm intimate glow of the city passing by outside the windows. She has long dark brown hair styled in a sleek blowout with a deep side part swept to the left, the hair falling in glossy polished waves past her shoulders with the top layer smooth and luminous catching every passing street light as a bright sliding reflection, while a few shorter face-framing strands fall loosely along her right cheekbone adding softness to the otherwise polished look. Fitness hourglass figure with ample chest visible above the frame of her outfit, toned shoulders. Light-medium neutral smooth skin with a flawless evening look enhanced by the flattering warm interior car lighting, real skin texture visible along her hairline and at her temples, a subtle healthy warmth across her cheeks. Makeup elevated for evening with softly sculpted natural brows filled slightly darker than her daytime look, a wash of warm bronze-champagne shimmer across her lids blended into the crease, defined upper lash line with a thin smudged dark brown liner creating soft smoky definition, black mascara adding volume and length to her naturally long lashes, clean highlighted skin with a subtle dewy glow along her cheekbones and the bridge of her nose, and a rich warm berry-toned lip stain that gives her lips a bitten just-kissed color deeper than her natural tone. She wears a fitted deep burgundy velvet camisole with thin spaghetti straps and a straight neckline that sits across her upper chest, the velvet fabric catching and absorbing the light in rich dark pools of shadow while the folds and edges shimmer with a warm lighter burgundy sheen, paired with a structured black wool blazer draped over her shoulders without her arms in the sleeves, the collar popped slightly and the lapels framing her face and the velvet camisole beneath. A pair of delicate gold drop earrings with a single small ruby-colored stone catch the light as she tilts her head. She holds her phone in her right hand extended toward the camera at a slightly elevated angle, the classic front-camera selfie position with the screen illuminating the underside of her chin with a faint cool-white glow, while her left hand rests on her crossed left knee with her fingers relaxed and her burgundy-painted nails visible. She leans back into the dark leather car seat with her left leg crossed over her right, her posture relaxed but upright with quiet authority. She looks up at the phone camera with a confident knowing expression, her chin slightly down and eyes looking up through her lashes creating a naturally alluring angle, one eyebrow raised fractionally, the corner of her mouth lifted in a self-satisfied smirk that says she knows exactly what she is doing. The car interior features smooth dark grey leather seats with subtle stitching detail, tinted windows through which blurred streaks of warm golden and cool blue-white city lights pass in long horizontal bokeh trails indicating the car is in motion, the occasional flash of a red traffic light or green neon sign creating brief color splashes across the window glass. The lighting is complex: warm golden city light filtering through the windows creates a shifting ambient glow that paints her face and shoulders with passing warm and cool tones, the phone screen adds a subtle cool fill light from below, and the overall effect is a dynamic interplay of warm amber from the streetlights and cool blue from the city night outside, with the interior kept deliberately low-lit and intimate. Deep burgundy velvet, warm gold, cool city blue, dark charcoal leather, ruby accent, warm amber streetlight, blurred neon bokeh color palette. Nighttime car selfie confidence aesthetic. Front camera selfie from slightly above, close-up to medium shot from chest up, vertical portrait with the dark car interior and blurred city light trails through windows visible in background. Photorealistic, high quality, high resolution, 9:16 aspect ratio.

posts.notes: chain_position: chain_start. Variant A — playful provocateur statement. 'u were warned' with smiling devil emoji is pure 'Cute but Deadly' Meruru — confident, teasing, slightly dangerous. 14 characters including emoji. The nighttime car selfie shows Meruru out on the town, in control, quietly commanding — the visual counterpart to the self-quote chain's escalation energy. Character lock enforced: dark brown hair, light-medium neutral skin, fitness hourglass, elevated evening makeup. Zero hashtags.
